treatment_information.treatment_response: Safe and well-tolerated; both patients showed stabilization of clinical symptoms

treatment_timeline.event: Initial clinical evaluation before starting DHA supplementation
Follow-up evaluation after 6 months of DHA treatment
Follow-up evaluation after 12 months of DHA treatment
Final evaluation after 20 months of DHA treatment; treatment interrupted due to elevated LDL and total cholesterol levels

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Evaluations at 6, 12, and 20 months of treatment
patient_outcome.complications: Elevated LDL and total cholesterol levels in P1
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Unchanged as assessed by EQ-5D-3L questionnaire
